calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2024 Continued To Jun-26-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Amended Notice Of Pending Action (Lis Pendens) And Request For Attorney'S Fees; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Feb-14-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: In-Person Appearances

Steven Morger Esq., Wendel Rosen LLP, 510-834-6600, for plaintiff
Alicia Vaz Esq., Cox, Castle & Nicholson LLP, 310-284-2200, for defendants

Mr. Morger contest to the tentative ruling. Matter discussed. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LASSEN HOUSING ASSOCIATES, L.P., A CALIFORNIA, BAYSIDE LASSEN, LLC., A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO EXPUNGE AMENDED NOTICE OF PENDING ACTION (LIS PENDENS) AND REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT is GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to establish probable validity of its claims. Attorney's fees granted as requested in the amount of $25,070.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Amended Notice Of Pending Action (Lis Pendens) And Request For Attorney'S Fees; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Feb-06-2024 Continued To Feb-14-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT LASSEN HOUSING ASSOCIATES, L.P., A CALIFORNIA, BAYSIDE LASSEN, LLC's Motion To Expunge Amended Notice Of Pending Action (Lis Pendens) And Request For Attorney'S Fees.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Transferred to be heard in department 501 on February 14, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all real property related cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. All parties to immediately provide courtesy copies of their filings to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date per SF Local Rule 2.7B.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported (302/RBU)
